name: Whole Grain Cereal
recipeIngredient: 1 cup mixed whole grains (e.g., wheat berries, oats, buckwheat, hulled barley, rye, millet)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1 cup of mixed whole grains and 3 cups of water in a stovetop pan with a cover.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil over high heat.
3. Reduce the heat to low and let it simmer until all the water is absorbed, stirring occasionally.
4. If using raisins, stir them into the cooked grains.
5. Cover the pot and let it cool completely at room temperature.
6. Alternatively, place the covered pot in an oven preheated to a low temperature (around 150°F or 65°C) to keep the cereal warm overnight.
7. In the morning, reheat the cereal if desired by heating it on the stovetop until warmed through.
8. Serve with toppings such as milk-type products, molasses, fruit, sesame seeds, maple syrup, or any other preferred accompaniments.
